steps.title: Convert g values to f values
steps.content:
Since $g(x)=\frac{f(x)}{x+2}$, multiply each $g(x)$ value by $x+2$ to find $f(x)$.
$f(-8)=0(-8+2)=0$
$f(10)=3(10+2)=36$

steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept of $y=f(x)$ is the point where $x=0$. Since $b=16$, the intercept is $(0,16)$. The answer is D.
